---
title: "Toast: A Case Study"
image: "../../files/IMG_0115.JPG"
subtitle: "An Analytical Deep Dive into My Cat"
date: 2026-04-03
categories: [Feline, Cats, Gatto, Kitty Cat]
---

## Project Overview

This project investigates the behavioral patterns, demographic profile, and
daily operations of Toast, a 3-year-old domestic shorthair cat adopted from
the San Diego Humane Society (SDHS).

## Subject Profile

| Attribute     | Value                          |
|---------------|-------------------------------|
| Name          | Toast                         |
| Age           | ~3 years (birthday TBD)       |
| Color         | Black                         |
| Origin        | San Diego Humane Society       |
| Status        | Adopted                      |
| Occupation    | Professional napper            |

## Key Findings

**Sleep Analysis:** Toast logs approximately 14–16 hours of sleep per day,
consistently outperforming industry benchmarks for household cats.

**Zoomies Frequency:** Peaks observed between 2–4am. Causation unknown.

**Adoption Impact:** Studies show black cats are adopted at lower rates than
other cats. Toast is a clear outlier and an excellent data point in favor of
black cats.

## Conclusion

Toast represents a high-value, low-maintenance asset with strong long-term
growth potential. His upcoming 3rd birthday marks a significant milestone
and warrants further observation.

---
*Data collected via direct observation. Sample size: 1 cat.*
